entity: 1992 NBA Draft #1 overall pick: Shaquille O'Neal (ORL; the most dominant physical force of his era, 4-time champion)
notes: Shaquille O'Neal was the #1 pick out of LSU; went to Orlando Magic as a marquee expansion-era recruit. The 1992 draft class also included Alonzo Mourning (#2) and Christian Laettner (#3).
